    W

    WalkDirection - Enum Class in logic
    Represents the player walk directions.
    WalkDirection() - Constructor for enum class logic.WalkDirection
     
    water() - Method in class entity.ingredients.WheatFlour
    Set watered state to true.
    water() - Method in interface entity.Waterable
    Set watered state to true.
    Waterable - Interface in entity
    Interface for ingredient which can be added water to using Water Dispenser.
    WaterDispenser - Class in logic.counters
    Counter for dispensing water.
    WaterDispenser(double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class logic.counters.WaterDispenser
    Constructs a WaterDispenser.
    watered - Variable in class entity.ingredients.WheatFlour
    Whether the flour has been watered.
    WHEAT_FLOUR - Enum constant in enum class logic.ItemSpriteType
    Enum constant for item sprite type.
    WheatFlour - Class in entity.ingredients
    Represents wheat flour ingredient.
    WheatFlour() - Constructor for class entity.ingredients.WheatFlour
    Constructs a new Wheat Flour ingredient.
    width - Variable in class entity.base.BaseContainer
    The width of the container.
    width - Variable in class logic.counters.BaseCounter
    The width of the counter.
